ddls:
CREATE TABLE "items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the item (e.g., Sword, Greatsword) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the item */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol representing the item, if any */,
  "mastery_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the mastery group this item belongs to */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of the item (e.g., Weapon, Armor) */,
  "rarity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the rarity level of the item */,
  "obtain_method" TEXT /* Method of obtaining the item (e.g., quest, purchase, drop) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the item was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_items_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES item_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_items_mastery_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("mastery_group_id") REFERENCES mastery_groups ("mastery_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_items_rarity_id FOREIGN KEY ("rarity_id") REFERENCES item_rarities ("rarity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mastery_groups" (
  "mastery_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the mastery group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the mastery group (e.g., Swords, Shields) */,
  "group_description" TEXT /* Description of the mastery group */,
  "base_stat_bonus" TEXT /* Base stat bonus for items in the mastery group */,
  "mastery_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the mastery group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mastery_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the item type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the item type (e.g., Weapon, Armor) */,
  "type_description" TEXT /* Description of the item type */,
  "is_stackable" INTEGER /* Indicates whether items of this type can be stacked */,
  "max_stack_size" INTEGER /* Maximum stack size for stackable items */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the stat entry */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the item this stat belongs to */,
  "damage" INTEGER /* Attack damage of the item */,
  "defense" INTEGER /* Defense value of the item (if applicable) */,
  "durability" INTEGER /* Durability of the item */,
  "speed" INTEGER /* Attack or movement speed of the item */,
  "critical_chance" REAL /* Critical hit chance of the item */,
  "critical_damage" REAL /* Critical hit damage multiplier of the item */,
  "cooldown" INTEGER /* Cooldown period for the item's special abilities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_stats_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_rarities" (
  "rarity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the rarity level */,
  "rarity_name" TEXT /* Name of the rarity level (e.g., Common, Rare) */,
  "rarity_description" TEXT /* Description of the rarity level */,
  "color_code" TEXT /* Color code for the rarity level */,
  "drop_rate" REAL /* Drop rate of items with this rarity level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rarity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_effects" (
  "effect_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the effect */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the item this effect belongs to */,
  "effect_description" TEXT /* Description of the effect (e.g., Fire Damage, Lifesteal) */,
  "effect_type" TEXT /* Type of effect (e.g., damage, healing, buff) */,
  "effect_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the effect */,
  "effect_strength" REAL /* Strength or magnitude of the effect */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("effect_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_effects_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "username" TEXT /* The username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Password hash for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the inventory entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who owns the item */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the item owned */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item owned */,
  "equipped" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the item is currently equipped */,
  "equipped_slot" TEXT /* Slot where the item is equipped (e.g., main hand, off hand, head) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user involved in the transaction */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the item involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., purchase, sale) */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date the transaction took place */,
  "price" INTEGER /* Price of the transaction */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the transaction (e.g., in-game shop, NPC, player trade) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_quests" (
  "quest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the quest */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the item linked to the quest */,
  "quest_description" TEXT /* Description of the quest associated with the item */,
  "reward_item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the item rewarded upon completing the quest */,
  "reward_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the reward item */,
  "quest_difficulty" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the quest */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_quests_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_quests_reward_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("reward_item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)
